tap_to_start: Tap to start AI audio guide
sites_nearby_hook: 12 historical sites nearby. Did you know Gion was built to accommodate the needs of travelers to the Yasaka Shrine?

story_hook.title: Which story do you want to hear?

settings.sync_disable_keeps_cloud: Disabling sync keeps cloud data — local stays unchanged.

share_card.share_text: I explored this place with Lorescape

welcome.title:
Let every place
tell its own story
welcome.tagline: An AI travelling storyteller. Wherever you go, it tells you the history, legends and lore of that very place.

value.title: A storyteller in your pocket
value.subtitle: Lorescape gathers guiding, exploring and journaling in one place, so every journey comes with a story.
value.pillar1_body: Instantly composes stories worth reading for the landmarks, monuments and landscapes in front of you — and reads them aloud as you walk.
value.pillar2_body: Discover every corner worth a pause within reach, by distance and by theme.
value.pillar3_body: The places you visit are bound into a book automatically, woven into a timeline of your own.

categories.title: Four landscapes, waiting to be read
categories.subtitle: From wild mountains to sacred sites, Lorescape has a story ready for every kind of place.

finish.title: The journey begins
finish.body: Your own compass of stories is ready — turn to the first page of Lorescape.

settings_onboarding.confirm_replay_body: The welcome screens will show again the next time you open the app.
